The VORSA Lite e-bike down at $1,395 shipped, while the standard VORSA e-bike is at $1,595 shipped, and the FT (Fat Tire) model is also down at $1,595 shipped. The standard and FT versions of this e-bike are down from $1,695 full prices, while the Lite model is dropping from a $1,495 price tag, which has consistently been the discount we’ve seen on them since getting their first savings back in August 2025, though it’s not regularly featured in sales like some of the other e-bikes under the brand’s flag. For the rest of this sale, you’re getting another shot at saving $100 at the lowest prices we have tracked.

Most QD-OLED displays in this category typically hover around the $800 mark, so this AOC model also stands out as one of the more affordable models at the full $550 price it has lately been going for. Today’s deal shaves $200 off that mark, landing it $20 below its previous all-time low from earlier this year. This is the lowest price we’ve tracked for it so far, making it an excellent option if you’ve been looking to give your battlestation an upgrade. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: All of the best early Memorial Day deals you can shop right now: Apple, Samsung, e-Bikes, Anker, more
items.summary:
Memorial Day 2026 is right around the corner and that means we are already tracking hundreds of notable deals across just about every product category. The official holiday sales at Amazon and Best Buy are now live alongside this year’s Walmart event, ushering in discounts on everything from Nintendo Switch 2, Apple, and Anker gear, to Samsung and smart home price drops, right over to groceries, console games, e-Bikes, power stations, and more. We have collected the best of the best for you below to browse through before the holiday weekend even begins.

more…

items.title: Rare chance to score EGO’s 2,100 PSI electric pressure washer + 6.0Ah battery at its $449 low, 3,200 PSI bundle at $779
items.summary:
Amazon is offering a rare chance at savings on the EGO Power+ 2,100 PSI Electric Pressure Washer with a 6.0Ah battery that has fallen to $449 shipped. Normally it’s rare to find a discount down from its $500 full price, with the last one we saw appearing in late January to $479, while 2025 saw drops to $477 and the $449 low. The deal here is not only the second time we’ve seen savings hit this model in 2026, but it’s also the first time since early summer 2025 that we’ve spotted the $51 markdown to its lowest tracked price. You can also find the much larger and more powerful 3,200 PSI EGO Electric Pressure Washer with two 6.0Ah batteries down at $779 shipped from its $879 full price.

more…

Surprise, surprise. I’m back with another deal on cord cover. It shouldn’t come as a shock at this point that I’m a huge fan of this stuff. I frequently cite the fact that it’s used throughout my home and I have zero shame in it. I love banishing cables, and this kit will allow you to hide three for up to 26 feet.

items.title: Anker’s 165W display-equipped 25K power bank with retractable USB-C cable is down to $96 as part of Memorial Day sale (2026 low)
items.summary:
As part of the ongoing Memorial Day sale, Anker’s official Amazon storefront is offering its 25,000mAh 165W laptop power bank for $95.99 shipped. Though this carries a $135 list price, it typically goes for $120 at Amazon. Today’s deal delivers a 29% discount, marking the return of the lowest price we have tracked for this beefy battery pack this year. It’s now within just $8 of the lowest price we have seen it fetch via the brand’s official Amazon storefront, making this a great time to cash in and snag one. You can get this in black and white finishes, and they’re both down to the $96 mark today. Head below for more details along with deals on other Anker charging units.
